message:
style(e2e): standardize privacy test logging to E2E format

Updates privacy test suite logging to use consistent [E2E-PRIVACY]
prefix format matching other E2E test suites.

Changes:
- runNTM() log messages now use printf-style formatting
- stdout/stderr/error messages prefixed with [E2E-PRIVACY]
- Aligns with redaction test suite logging conventions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
